name: projectm
description: projectM - Cross-platform Music Visualization Library. Open-source and Milkdrop-compatible.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: awesome-for-beginners
description: A list of awesome beginners-friendly projects.

name: milkdrop2
description: A read-only, just-for-reference fork of the original Milkdrop source repository located at SourceForge: https://sourceforge.net/p/milkdrop2/

name: museum
description: Repository with old and stale code that will not see any further development. For historical/reference purposes only.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: frontend-qt
description: :bangbang: CURRENTLY BROKEN :bangbang: - Will be fixed some time after the libprojectM 4.0 release! Help is highly appreciated. Qt-based standalone frontend to projectM. Currently supports Linux with PulseAudio or JACK audio backends.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: frontend-sdl-cpp
description: Standalone application based on libSDL that turns your desktop audio into awesome visuals. Available on most platforms supported by both libprojectM and libSDL.

name: presets-cream-of-the-crop
description: Jason Fletcher's curated preset pack containing only the best of the best of all released Milkdrop presets. This is the default preset pack in most new projectM releases.

name: presets-en-d
description: This is a smaller collection of about 50 Milkdrop presets created or remixed by "En D".

name: frontend-uwp
description: :warning: Help needed! See README.md for details. +++ This is the official Universal Windows Platform application called "EyeTune", available in the Microsoft Store. It runs on any X86-based UWP-enabled device, e.g. Surface tablets and some Windows Mobile devices.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: examples-android
description: Sample Android app that integrates projectM and visualizes audio on mobile devices. NOTE: This is NOT the Android app found in the Play Store! Please refer to the README for details.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: examples-emscripten
description: Example code to show how to use projectM within WASM-based emscripten applications.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: tools-moviegen
description: Quicktime-based movie generator for Windows and macOS to turn audio files into videos by rendering projectM visuals to the music.

name: frontend-music-plug-in
description: This is the projectM visualization plug-in for Apple Music on macOS that turns your music into awesome visuals while you listen.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: frontend-libvisual-plug-in
description: The projectM libvisual plug-in that enables any application using libvisual to display projectM visualizations.

name: presets-milkdrop-texture-pack
description: This repository contains all textures originally released with Milkdrop, plus a good number of other textures used in a large number of presets.

name: presets-milkdrop-original
description: The original preset pack that was deployed with the last official Milkdrop release, textures excluded.

name: presets-projectm-classic
description: The classic projectM preset collection that was published until version 3.1.12. Contains about 4.200 presets.

name: presets-community
description: Presets provided by the projectM and Milkdrop community. If you have made some awesome presets you'd like to share, this is where you can share them!

name: projectm-rs
description: Rust crate for projectM visualizer

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: frontend-sdl-rust
description: Rust | SDL-based standalone application that turns your desktop audio into awesome visuals.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: projectm-sys
description: Rust FFI for projectM

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: projectm-eval
description: The projectM Expression Evaluation Library. A portable drop-in replacement of Milkdrop's "ns-eel2" expression parser for use in Milkdrop, projectM and other applications. MIT licensed.

name: projectm-visualizer.org
description: Website | Nuxt 3 | GitHub Pages

name: build-gtest
description: Googletest build scripts

name: gst-projectm
description: This is a plugin for GStreamer that allows you to utilize the ProjectM library to create visualizations from audio.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

name: visualizer-ng-ideas
description: Wiki and discussions to collect features and ideas for a next-generation visualizer library and preset format. See the ReadMe for additional details.
